---
title: "my-first-quarto-website"
---

[![](https://zenodo.org/badge/DOI/10.5281/zenodo.21263422.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21263422)

### **This website was developed during the SIB training "Make your research FAIRer with Quarto, GitHub and Zenodo"**

\![ ](https://live.staticflickr.com/108/311263968_6131948761.jpg){#fig-logo width="400" fig-align="right"}

In this project we aim to visualize the trends of the most frequently used babynames from 1880 to 2017 in the United States. We do this by:

-   Understanding the different columns of the data set

-   Find the top 10 most frequently used baby names in the data for:

    -   girls

    -   boys

-   Plot the yearly trend of the top 10 baby names
